calendar.matters:
PETITION FOR SPOUSAL PROPERTY
Off Calendar Oct-22-2025 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Joung Sook Cropper, petitioner in pro per.
Ted Tim, Court certified Korean interpreter with an oath on file (Certification No. 306380).

The matter was called for hearing on Petition for Spousal Property.

The Court noted that the deficiencies identified by the Probate Examiner had not been addressed since the prior hearing. Ms. Cropper was advised to obtain legal counsel to assist her with refiling her petition and was provided information about the Bar Association of San Francisco's lawyer referral service.

Following discussion, the Court ordered the petition taken off calendar.

Judge: Ross C. Moody; Clerk: Kenneth B. Hunt; Not reported (D204)

PETITION FOR SPOUSAL PROPERTY
Off Calendar Aug-27-2025 Continued To Oct-22-25 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Joung Sook Cropper, Petitioner in Pro Per.
Edward Kang appeared to assist petitioner.

The matter came on calendar for hearing on petitioner's spousal property petition.

The Court noted that the probate examiner had issued notes identifying several defects in the petition and attachments. Mr. Kang indicated that he had been assisting the petitioner with her papers, and that documents were submitted to the probate examiner. The Court explained that corrections and supplemental information must be formally filed with the clerk, verified by petitioner, rather than sent informally to the probate examiner.

Following discussion, the Court continued the matter to October 22, 2025, at 9:00 a.m. in Department 204, to allow time for petitioner to address the issues raised in the examiner's notes.

Judge: Ross C. Moody; Clerk: Kenneth B. Hunt; Not reported (D204)
